title: limonium ovalifolium subsp. pyramidatum
intro: Limonium ovalifolium subsp. pyramidatum, also known as Sea Lavender, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Plumbaginaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sea Lavender include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting better sleep, and providing relief from digestive issues and skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Limonium ovalifolium subsp. pyramidatum include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
